recommendations.title: The Bad Education Movie
recommendations.overview: Mr Wickers and his class go on one final school trip after they finish their GCSEs.

recommendations.title: Through My Window: Across the Sea
recommendations.overview: After a year of long-distance, Raquel and Ares reunite on a steamy beach trip. Faced with fresh flirtations and insecurities, will their love prevail?

recommendations.title: Little Boy
recommendations.overview: An eight-year-old boy is willing to do whatever it takes to end World War II so he can bring his father home. The story reveals the indescribable love a father has for his little boy and the love a son has for his father.

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.

recommendations.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
recommendations.overview: A young boy wins a tour through the most magnificent chocolate factory in the world, led by the world's most unusual candy maker.

recommendations.title: The Lizzie McGuire Movie
recommendations.overview: Lizzie McGuire has graduated from middle school and takes a trip to Rome, Italy with her class. And what was supposed to be only a normal trip, becomes a teenager's dream come true.

recommendations.title: Storm Boy
recommendations.overview: Storm Boy lives a lonely life with his reclusive father on a desolate coastline, but when he forms a close bond with a pelican, Mr. Percival, his life takes a new and unexpected turn.

recommendations.title: Boys Don't Cry
recommendations.overview: A young aspiring violinist unwittingly becomes involved with a criminal gang.

recommendations.title: Les Francis
recommendations.overview: Comical trip to Corse reminiscent of A very bad trip.

recommendations.title: I Believe
recommendations.overview: A 9 year old boy experiences God's power in a supernatural way.
